BasicUsage.ino.functionality: reads temperature from an LM75-derived temperature sensor and displays it in Celsius every 250ms

MultipleSensors.ino.functionality: reads the temperature from two LM75-derived sensors with different addresses (0x48 and 0x49), and displays them in Celsius every 250ms

OnSemiOneShotMode.ino.functionality: demonstrates the use of one-shot mode for temperature conversion using the NCT75 sensor to conserve power

ShutdownModeOneShot.ino.functionality: Shuts down the sensor to save power and uses one-shot conversion to request a single immediate temperature conversion

Thermostat.ino.functionality: sets up a thermostat using the LM75 sensor that triggers an alert based on temperature thresholds and prints temperature data along with alert status to the serial port
